case_title: KROUZIAN, KRIKOR vs. HAMDY, HESHAM H. et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KROUZIAN, KRIKOR

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KROUZIAN, KRIKOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAMDY, HESHAM H. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2905 VAN NESS AVE #201, LEASE FORFEITED
